response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video to identify segments. Identified intro talk, a song performance, and an outro talk. 2. Identified song title 'モニタリング' (Monitoring) by DECO*27 from on-screen text. 3. Used search tool to find the official Japanese lyrics and their English translation. 4. Mapped timestamps for the scenes and structured the data into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: This video features an introductory discussion between two VTubers, followed by a vocal performance of the song "Monitoring (Best Friend Remix)" by DECO*27, and concludes with an outro discussion.

scenes.description: The two performers are standing on a stage, talking to the audience and introducing the song they are about to perform.
A live performance of "Monitoring (Best Friend Remix)" by DECO*27. The performer dances and sings throughout the scene.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, I know, I know you’re doing “XX” alone
Trembling and twitching, your voice is leaking out
Just be honest, you’ve been found out anyway, so say it, is it working?
It’s normal, normal, embarrassing? Everyone’s just hiding it

Hey, I know, I know you’re crying alone
Sniffling and depressed, singing your weakness alone in the night
Staying together until morning, cry even more if you want
I’ll catch it every time for you
Don’t hold it in anymore, just let it all out

MWAH!
Please, I want you
Let me comfort you, shake shake, with the talent of love
If you don’t cry, I’ll dry up, I want to stay wet
Hey, it’s fine, right? I want to lick it away and drink it all down

MWAH!
Please, I want you
Scatter your dependence, sick love, isn’t it the best?
If you don’t share it with me, I want to feel your “pain”
Hey, it’s fine, right? I want to suck it out and save you

I want to see inside you

Hey, I know, I know you’re frustrated alone
My heartbeat pounds faster, I won’t stop supporting you
Hey, I know, I know you’re capable
It’s okay to be weak when it’s tough, I love you even so

MWAH!
Please, I want you
Call my name, I’ll always come running
You’re alone, so I’ll sing, “You’re not alone”
It’s fine now
Solo play ends here

Even when you’re sick, I’ll be by your side
I’m always watching over you, yes, there’s nothing to fear

MWAH!
Please, I want you
Let me comfort you, shake shake, with the talent of love
If you don’t cry, I’ll dry up, I want to stay wet
Hey, it’s fine, right? I want to lick it away and drink it all down

MWAH!
Please, I want you
Scatter your dependence, sick love, isn’t it the best?
If you don’t share it, I want to feel your “pain,” I want to peek inside
I want to suck it out and save you

Hey, I know, I know you’re crying alone
Sniffling and depressed, singing your weakness alone in the night
Staying together until morning, cry even more if you want
I’ll catch it every time for you
Don’t hold back anymore, let it all out

Come on

scenes.description: The performance concludes, and the performers talk to the audience again as the video ends.
